channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How OpenAI’s Jerry Tworek found a new way forward for large language models
item.description: The impressive intelligence gains in OpenAI’s models over time have mainly come from training them with progressively more training data, for longer amounts of time, and with massive computing power.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ireland embraced data centers that the AI boom needs. Now they're consuming too much of its energy
item.description: Dozens of massive data centers are consuming more electricity than all of the urban homes in Ireland and starting to wear out the warm welcome that brought them here.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Welcome to the Drone Age, New Jersey
item.description: Thousands of New Jersey residents have recently reported mysterious lights in the sky, triggering speculation and calls for investigation.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Salesforce’s Agentforce 2.0 update aims to make AI agents smarter
item.description: Salesforce has updated its agentic AI platform, Agentforce, to help enterprises build and deploy better agents, faster, across systems and workflows. Agentforce 2.0 is the second release of the agentic AI platform in two months.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: McConnell urges Supreme Court to reject TikTok's bid to delay ban
item.description: Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.) filed an amicus brief with the Supreme Court on Wednesday, urging it to reject TikTok’s request to delay a law that could ban the app next month.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: VA EHR in better shape to resume go-lives in FY 2025 after ‘incremental’ fixes
item.description: VA’s Oracle-Cerner EHR has seen a 50% decrease in crashes and lags since the VA completed its last round of updates in August. The post VA EHR in better shape to resume go-lives in FY 2025 after ‘incremental’ fixes first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: Github Launches GitHub Copilot Free: A Game-Changing AI-Based Pair Programmer
item.description: GitHub has launched a free tier of its AI-based pair programmer, GitHub Copilot Free, providing access to 2,000 code completions and 50 chat messages monthly.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: YouTube’s top trends for 2024 include Bay Area creators
item.description: Online video giant YouTube has published its year-end top trends lists for 2024 and in includes Bay Area content creators.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Elon Musk’s Grok-2 is now free—and it’s a mess
item.description: Late Friday night, Elon Musk’s xAI opened up Grok-2 access to the masses. The model isn’t all that different from the original Grok, though the company claims it runs faster and has improved accuracy. And yet, X users have spent the weekend dunking on it.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: 5 wizardly ways to integrate web apps with Windows
item.description: While Windows is a powerful operating system for productivity, so much of what we do with work these days revolves around the web.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: EPA fosters IT resilience through cloud, integrated teams, automation tools
item.description: EPA's CIO says modernized tools and integrated teams help the agency meet the changing needs of the public more easily and consistently. The post EPA fosters IT resilience through cloud, integrated teams, automation tools first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Equinix to end its bare-metal service
item.description: Hosting and colocation giant Equinix is sunsetting its bare-metal infrastructure-as-a-service (IaaS) offering by June 2026. New features will no longer be added to Equinix Metal, as the service was called.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Steps to protect yourself while shopping on your phone this holiday season
item.description: The holiday season sees a rise in mobile shopping scams. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you learn how to stay safe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Analyze text using natural language with Claude for Google Sheets
item.description: You can do a lot more with generative AI (genAI) in Google Sheets than get help writing spreadsheet formulas.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The case for private clouds for data management in government
item.description: When it comes to taking advantage of AI, storing data in a cost-effective, massively scalable private or hybrid cloud solution is often the best choice. The post The case for private clouds for data management in government first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Senate report alleges Amazon rejected warehouse safety recommendations due to productivity concerns
item.description: At least two internal Amazon studies found a link between how quickly the online retailer's warehouse workers perform tasks and workplace injuries, but the company rejected many safety recommendations out of concern the proposed changes might reduce productivity, according to a U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AI-powered deception: The sneaky macOS malware masquerading as your next video call
item.description: Artificial intelligence is making life easier for cybercriminals, allowing them to create elaborate scams to trick people. Kurt the Cyberguy explains how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eyewitness accounts of New Jersey drones include politicians, journalist
item.description: Here are some of the firsthand accounts of the drone sightings, as told to NewsNation by eyewitnesses.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Lawmakers tell Apple, Google to prepare for TikTok ban
item.description: TikTok now plans to appeal to the Supreme Court and has asked the D.C. Circuit to put the law on hold while it appeals the case.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: Your phone got hacked and now someone's got control of it. What to do immediately
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson lays out the immediate steps you should take if your phone has been hacked and your personal information becomes vulnerable.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States, rejecting a request made by the company to halt enforcement until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge of the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Groups urge Trump to reinforce National Cyber Director role
item.description: The role of the White House national cyber director has emerged as a key issue for former cyber officials as the Trump administration prepares to take over. The post Groups urge Trump to reinforce National Cyber Director role first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Sophia, a famous robot and global icon of AI, wins hearts at Zimbabwe's innovation fair
item.description: HARARE, Zimbabwe (AP) — From answering questions from Cabinet ministers, academics and students on climate change, substance abuse and the law to children’s inquiries about her “birth” and links to God and being described as a talkative feminist, Sophia, the world-famous robot won hearts at an innov
item.dc:creator: BY FARAI MUTSAKA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Metaphor: ReFantazio, Dragon Age, Astro Bot and an indie wave lead the top AP video games of 2024
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It’s been a rough year in the world of video games, which reeled from some high-profile flops (sorry, Suicide Squad and Star Wars fans) and a relentless series of developer layoffs. Fortunately, indie designers stepped up to fill in the gaps.
item.dc:creator: LOU KESTEN, Associated Press, ABC 4
